query:
SELECT 
  m.id,
  m.clientId,
  c.name as clientName,
  m.mealType,
  m.createdAt,
  m.aiDescription,
  m.calories,
  m.protein,
  m.carbs,
  m.fat,
  m.fibre
FROM meals m
LEFT JOIN clients c ON m.clientId = c.id
WHERE m.source = 'nutrition_label'
  AND (m.calories > 1000 OR m.protein > 100 OR m.carbs > 200)
ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
